steps.title: Set up
steps.content: Translate the word problem: $x(x - 15) = 286$, which expands to $x^2 - 15x - 286 = 0$.

steps.title: Solve
steps.content: Factor: find two numbers that multiply to $-286$ and add to $-15$. Those are $-26$ and $11$.$$(x - 26)(x + 11) = 0 \Rightarrow x = 26 \text{ or } x = -11$$Since $x$ must be positive, $x = 26$.
